text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This is the entrance of Tracen Academy.
We can also call it the Home screen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
From here, you can access various places
within Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can begin a Career playthrough for
any of your trainees here.
